main.description: Mark the calling app's notifications to a user as read — by default all of them, or a specific set via `ids`. Useful when the user has seen them inside the app, so they don't also show unread in atmo.pub. Dual-authenticated like setRouting (app JWT in the Authorization header + a user-issued `userToken`). Only ever affects the calling app's own notifications. Requires an active grant from the user to the app.

userToken.description: A user-issued atproto service-auth JWT (com.atproto.server.getServiceAuth) with aud = the relay's DID and lxm = pub.atmo.notify.markRead.

ids.description: Specific notification ids to mark read (still scoped to this app). Omit to mark all of this app's notifications read.

marked.description: Number of notifications newly marked read.
